name: North Bend Golf Club
address: 119 W North Bend Way, North Bend, WA 98045
about: North Bend Golf Club offers a premier indoor golf simulation experience designed to elevate your game with state-of-the-art simulators. The facility provides a realistic golfing environment regardless of weather conditions, allowing golfers of all skill levels to practice their swing, play a round with friends, or compete in tournaments. Flexible membership options and hourly booking are available, providing options for training or casual play. The venue features a 19th Hole Lounge with beer, seltzers, and cider, and allows guests to bring their own food. With a 200-square-foot putting green and multisport simulators for activities like soccer, baseball, and zombie dodgeball, it serves as both a training facility and an entertainment venue.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with real-time swing and ball data
365-day access with flexible membership options and hourly booking
Multisport simulators for entertainment beyond golf

food_and_drink.notes: BYOF (Bring Your Own Food) allowed from nearby restaurants
Beer, seltzers, and cider available in the 19th Hole Lounge

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is not explicitly stated on the website, but as a golf simulation facility, you would typically need to bring your own clubs to use the simulators effectively.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows you to bring your own food (BYOF) from nearby restaurants. They also serve beer, seltzers, and cider in the 19th Hole Lounge.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time it takes to play 18 holes, but typical golf simulations take 1.5 to 2 hours for a full round depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, North Bend Golf Club is kid-friendly, offering memberships that include immediate family (spouse and children under 18), and hosting events like the Fall Junior Golf Academy.
